titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Department of Classics, Yale University, Records
Department of Classics, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 10:07

did.unittitle: Department of Classics, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of minutes, correspondence, reports, and personnel files documenting personnel, teaching appointments, curriculum, the American Numismatic Society, and the Board of Permanent Officers of the Yale Department of Classics.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 14-B (YRG 14-B), Records of academic departments and programs of the Yale Faculty of Arts and Sciences.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the Department of Classics, 1931-2008.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Department of Classics, Yale University, Records (RU 419). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of minutes, correspondence, reports, and personnel files documenting personnel, teaching appointments, curriculum, the American Numismatic Society, and the Board of Permanent Officers of the Yale Department of Classics.

did.unittitle: Minutes of meetings of the permanent officers
Meeting minutes of the permanent officers
Annual Department Reports and President's Report
Department Meeting Minutes and Requirements for Doctorate Degress
List of Coins from Curium and from Apollo
A Paper on Professor James Luce Kingsley read before the Yale Classical Club
Re: Departmental Teaching Positions at Yale
Re: Departmental Teaching Positions at Yale
Re: Departmental Teaching Positions at Yale
Personnel Files [restricted 75 years from year individual left Yale]
Research Assistants, Fellows, and Other Employees
Teaching Positions Outside Yale Inquiries and Recommendations
Teaching Positions Outside Yale Inquiries and Recommendations
Teaching Positions Outside Yale Inquiries and Recommendations
Teaching Positions Outside Yale Inquiries and Recommendations
